title: rubus malacus
intro: Rubus malacus, also known as the wild raspberry, is a perennial shrub native to Europe, Asia, and North America. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its berries, which are high in antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals. The health benefits of Rubus malacus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Rubus malacus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
